top_categories.workout_context: 175 miles. Your legs will beg to quit after 120. This trains the power output you need from mile 130 onward.
175 miles rewards fat oxidation. This volume work shifts your fuel mix so you're still burning fat at hour 5, not bonking at hour 3.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 175 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 6,800ft of climbing on paved country roads — flat to rolling does to your power file on race day.
Race-pace efforts that mimic RAW — Ride Across Wisconsin's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before July.
6,800ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
RAW — Ride Across Wisconsin's paved country roads — flat to rolling rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
Tempo is RAW — Ride Across Wisconsin's race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 175 miles on paved country roads — flat to rolling. Train it until it's automatic.
RAW — Ride Across Wisconsin's paved country roads — flat to rolling forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 175 miles.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of RAW — Ride Across Wisconsin. Train it until it feels boring.
At RAW — Ride Across Wisconsin, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 175 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.

race_overlay.nutrition: Ultra-distance fueling for 175 miles: 80–100g carbs/hour from mile 1 — don’t wait until you’re hungry. Practice your exact race-day nutrition in every long training ride. Carry backup calories. 175 miles burns 8,000–12,000+ calories — you cannot replace them all, but you must try.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, HVLI Extended, and Endurance to prepare you for 175 miles of paved country roads — flat to rolling in Eau Claire, Wisconsin, USA.
